title: JSA acts on Raajmarg Infrastructure InvIT ₹6,000 crore IPO
description: Raajmarg Infrastructure Investment Trust has made an Initial Public Offering of units aggregating to ₹6,000 crore.JSA Advocates & Solicitors advised Raajmarg InvIT, their sponsor National Highway Authority of India, and Raajmarg Infra Investment Managers Private Limited on this IPO. The Firm also advised on the setting-up of the InvIT and the Investment Manager.The transaction team was led by Arka Mookerjee (Partner), with support from Pracheta Bhattacharya (Partner), Sourav Modi (Principal
